LanguageData.PFP_PreferenceDeprivationHideInRoom.reco: {0} is no longer hiding away over preference deprivation.
LanguageData.PFP_PreferenceDeprivationHideInRoom.begi: {0} has gone too long without eating preferred food and has shut themselves away.
LanguageData.PFP_PreferenceDeprivationHideInRoom.base: Mental state: Hiding away over preference deprivation
LanguageData.PFP_PreferenceDeprivationSadWander.label: preference deprivation: wandering
LanguageData.PFP_PreferenceDeprivationSadWander.recov: {0} is no longer wandering over preference deprivation.
LanguageData.PFP_PreferenceDeprivationSadWander.begin: {0} has gone too long without eating preferred food and is wandering outside in frustration.
LanguageData.PFP_PreferenceDeprivationSadWander.baseI: Mental state: Wandering over preference deprivation
